NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING ISSUANCE OF ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE (CCP 1085 & 1086), POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, ROBERT E. HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, ROBERT E.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-22-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ROBERT GONZALES' MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING ISSUANCE OF ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE (CCP 1085, 1086) IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILS TO STATE RELIEF REQUESTED. THE PLANNING DEPARTMENT HELD A HEARING FOR DISCRETIONARY REVIEW AND CONSIDERED PETITIONER'S ARGUMENT AND REVISED PLANS SUBMITTED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST WHICH THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE DEPARTMENT WERE APPROVED. PETITIONER HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THE SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING CODE OR RESIDENTIAL DESIGN GUIDELINES HAS BEEN VIOLATED, AS FOUND BY THE BOARD OF PERMIT APPEALS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate (Ccp 1085 & 1086)
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Gonzales telephone number 415-238-0749 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
James Emery of Office of The City Attorney telephone number 415-554-4628 for Respondent City and County of San Francisco.
Thomas Tunny of Reuben, Junius & Rose, LLP telephone number 415-567-9000 for Real Party In Interest Ed Maiello.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROBERT GONZALES' Motion For Order Directing Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate (CCP 1085, 1086) is denied. Petitioner fails to state relief requested. The Planning Department held a hearing for discretionary review and considered Petitioner's argument and revised plans submitted by Real Party in Interest which the requirements of the Department were approved. Petitioner has not established that the San Francisco Planning Code or Residential Design Guidelines has been violated, as found by the Board of Permit Appeals. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate (Ccp 1085 & 1086)
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Gonzales telephone number 415-238-0749 Petioner in Propria Persona.
James Emery of Office of The City Attorney telephone number 415-554-4628 for Defendant San Francisco Board of Appeals.
Thomas Tunny of Reuben, Junius & Rose LLP telephone number 415-567-9000 for Real Party in Interest Ed Maiello.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ROBERT GONZALES' Motion For Order Directing Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate (CCP 1085 & 1086) is continued to January 6, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 for the Court to examine the service issue.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
